results.rendered_html:
1. ā-√bhū -bhavati (Impf. 2. sg. ā-Bavas; pf. ā-babhūva, &c.)
to be present or near at hand;
to assist;
to exist, be,  RV. ;  AV. ;  VS. ;
to continue one's existence,  MBh. ;
to originate, be produced, begin to exist,  RV. ;  AV. ;  ŚBr.

results.rendered_html:
ābhū (von bhū mit ā) adj. tüchtig, nachhaltig, wirksam: ābhūbhirindraḥ śnathayannanābhuvaḥ  ṚV. 1,51,9 . dudhra ābhūṣu 56,3 . giraḥ samañje vidatheṣvābhuvaḥ 64,1,6 . rayiṃ dadātyābhuvam 133,7 . dakṣamābhuvam 151,4 . ābhūbhirindra turvaṇiḥ 5,35,3 .
— Vgl. ābhūti, anābhū, svābhū.
